computed_fields.description: KPI metric values are computed on-demand and cached as MetricSnapshots

standard_kpis.formula: SUM(invoices.total) WHERE status = 'paid' AND paid_at BETWEEN period_start AND period_end
AVG(paid_at - issue_date) FROM invoices WHERE status = 'paid' AND paid_at >= period_start

domain_rules.rule: Default dashboard: only one per org allowed
domain_rules.api_guard: when setting is_default=true, first unset is_default on any existing default dashboard for org
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Set as Default action available in dashboard list; current default indicated with star icon
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX dashboards_org_is_default_unique ON dashboards(org_id) WHERE is_default = true

domain_rules.rule: Widget data is cached for 15 minutes — stale data shown with indicator
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show amber stale-data badge on widget if computed_at older than 15 minutes; manual refresh button triggers GET /widgets/:id/data bypassing cache

domain_rules.rule: metric_key must be unique within org for KPIMetrics
domain_rules.api_guard: Zod uniqueness validated via pre-check query on create
domain_rules.ui_behavior: show inline error 'metric key already in use' on form field
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX kpi_metrics_org_metric_key_unique ON kpi_metrics(org_id, metric_key)

domain_rules.rule: Report exports expire after 24 hours from S3
domain_rules.api_guard: generate signed S3 URLs with 86400 second expiry; return expiry timestamp in response
domain_rules.ui_behavior: show expiry time on export download link; disable link if expired

domain_rules.rule: MetricSnapshot computed_at must be after period_end
domain_rules.api_guard: reject snapshot creation if computed_at <= period_end; return 422
reject create/update of FinancialAlert if referenced kpi_metric.is_active = false
domain_rules.ui_behavior: MetricSelector in alert form filters out inactive metrics; show warning badge on existing alerts whose metric is deactivated

dashboards.description: Set as default dashboard for org

widgets.description: Fetch computed data for widget: { current_value, previous_value, change_pct, chart_data, breakdown }

kpi_metrics.description: Force immediate recomputation of metric snapshot
Get metric snapshot history: query params from, to

metric_snapshots.description: Query snapshots: params metric_key, from, to
Background job: compute snapshots for all active KPI metrics

reports.description: P&L report: params from, to, comparison
General ledger: params from, to, account_id
Budget vs actual: params budget_id, from, to
Export report to PDF or XLSX; runs as background job; returns download URL

flows.name: Build Dashboard
steps: Create dashboard: POST /dashboards with name, description, share_with
Add widgets: POST /widgets with widget_type, data_source, metric_key, period, comparison_period, display_format
Configure each widget: open WidgetConfigModal, set chart_config (colors, legend, axis labels)
Drag widgets to arrange on DashboardGrid; positions saved to layout_config on drop
Resize widgets using ResizeHandle to adjust width/height grid units
Save layout: PATCH /dashboards/:id with updated widget_ids and layout_config
Optionally POST /dashboards/:id/set-default to make this the org landing dashboard

flows.name: Aggregate Data (background)
steps: Scheduled job runs every 15 minutes: POST /metric-snapshots/compute-all
For each active KPIMetric, execute formula expression against PostgreSQL
Store computed value as MetricSnapshot (upsert on org_id + metric_key + snapshot_date)
After each snapshot stored, check all active FinancialAlerts referencing this metric_key
Evaluate alert condition against new value (and comparison_window lookback if applicable)
If condition met: update alert status to triggered, set last_triggered_at and last_value_at_trigger
Emit metric.alert_triggered websocket event
Deliver via notification_channels (email/slack/webhook) asynchronously
Emit metric.snapshot_updated websocket event to update live dashboards

flows.name: Display Analytics
steps: Widget mounts and calls GET /widgets/:id/data with configured period parameters
Server computes metric for period: current_value, previous_value, change_pct
Server returns chart_data array and breakdown object
Frontend renders appropriate chart component based on widget_type
If computed_at older than 15 minutes, show stale-data amber badge on WidgetCard
Manual refresh calls GET /widgets/:id/data with cache-bust header

flows.name: Export Report
steps: User configures report parameters (date range, comparison, filters) in ReportView
POST /reports/:reportId/export with format (pdf or xlsx) and parameters
Background job generates report file server-side
Generated file stored in AWS S3 with signed URL expiring after 24 hours
report.export_ready websocket event emitted with download_url and expires_at
NotificationBell updates unread count; user clicks to download

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

patterns.name: write_with_audit
steps: BEGIN
acquire_row_lock
validate_business_rules
write_entity
write_audit_log
COMMIT

patterns.name: bulk_operation
steps: BEGIN
validate_all_records
write_batch
write_audit_log_batch
COMMIT

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id

external_entity_refs.name: RevenueAccount
external_entity_refs.description: GL account a KPI metric is scoped to.

external_entity_refs.name: FinancialPeriod
external_entity_refs.description: Period a metric snapshot belongs to.
